# zohomail_mailbox_forwarding (Resource)

Manage internal Zoho Mail forwarding rules for a mailbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zohomail_mailbox" "support" {
  primary_email_address = "support@example.com"
  initial_password      = var.mailbox_initial_password
  first_name            = "Support"
  last_name             = "Team"
  display_name          = "Support"
  role                  = "member"
  country               = "FR"
  language              = "fr"
  time_zone             = "Europe/Paris"
}

resource "zohomail_mailbox_forwarding" "support" {
  mailbox_id = zohomail_mailbox.support.id

  target_addresses = [
    "sales@example.com",
    "hello@example.com",
  ]

  delete_zoho_mail_copy = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mailbox_id` (String) Zoho Mail mailbox identifier (`zuid`).
- `target_addresses` (Set of String) Forwarding target email addresses. V1 constrains them to domains already attached to the mailbox.

### Optional

- `delete_zoho_mail_copy` (Boolean) Whether Zoho Mail should delete the original mailbox copy after forwarding.

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (String) Zoho Mail account identifier backing the mailbox.
- `id` (String) Forwarding resource identifier. Equal to `mailbox_id`.
